title: Quality Control Analytics
description: Monitor production quality with IoT sensor data, track OEE, defect rates, and yield across production lines using a medallion architecture.
longDescription: This demo deploys a complete manufacturing quality control analytics environment. It ingests synthetic IoT sensor data (temperature, pressure, vibration) from production lines along with batch production records. The data flows through a Bronze-Silver-Gold medallion architecture, producing KPIs like Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE), defect rates, yield percentages, and Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF). A Power BI semantic model with Direct Lake connectivity powers real-time dashboards with control charts and trend analysis.
prerequisites: Azure AD account with Fabric workspace creation permissions

sampleData.description: IoT sensor readings from production line equipment (temperature, pressure, vibration, humidity)
Production batch records with product, line, shift, start/end times, units produced, and defect counts
Equipment master data — machine ID, type, production line, install date

fabricItems.name: quality_lakehouse
fabricItems.description: Central lakehouse for all quality control data

fabricItems.name: 01_bronze_ingest
fabricItems.description: Ingest raw CSV files into Bronze Delta tables with metadata columns

fabricItems.name: 02_silver_transform
fabricItems.description: Clean, deduplicate, and enrich sensor data; calculate per-reading quality flags

fabricItems.name: 03_gold_aggregate
fabricItems.description: 6 Gold tables: production summary, equipment health, shift performance, product rankings, weekly trends, line scorecards

fabricItems.name: 04_reporting_views
fabricItems.description: SQL reporting views: executive dashboard, equipment alerts, production trends, quality scorecard

fabricItems.name: 05_dashboard
fabricItems.description: Interactive HTML dashboard with KPI cards, OEE trends, equipment health, shift comparison, product rankings

fabricItems.name: quality_analytics_model
fabricItems.description: Direct Lake semantic model with OEE, defect, and yield measures

fabricItems.name: Quality Control Dashboard
fabricItems.description: 3-page Power BI dashboard with KPIs, OEE trends, equipment health, and product quality

fabricItems.name: daily_quality_pipeline
fabricItems.description: Orchestrates Bronze → Silver → Gold notebook execution daily
